data.body: 4e19: impl done (held-out oracle GREEN incl edge/back-compat), full CI green except one UNRELATED venv-in-worktree artifact (test_resolve_symbol_tool: yaml classified repo-local because .venv is inside the worktree — passes in clean CI). Committed b5f4c9e37, pushed Gerrit change 687 (Change-Id Ib3b5ba6). Awaiting LLM-Review + Verified. 7c84 plan re-reviewed after remediation (dropped 'overflow', specified YAML+coach wiring, added depends_on 4e19, enumerated breaking test).
